DP.127.0000:
Welcome to the Great Marsh, the home
of Pastoria’s Safari Game!\f
All you can catch for just $500!
Would you like to play a Safari Game?
DP.127.0004:
We’ll let you know when your game
is over.\f
Until then, enjoy yourself, please!
Off you go on your wild excursion!\f
DP.127.0006:
You don’t have enough money.
Sorry.\f
DP.127.0007:
I’m sorry, you don’t have enough
room to catch any more Pokémon.\f
DP.127.0008:
Welcome to the Great Marsh, the home
of Pastoria’s Safari Game!\f
Recently, there have been sightings
of Pokémon that are new to the area.\f
Which brings us to...\f
All you can catch for just $500!
Would you like to play a Safari Game?
DP.127.0009:
You still have time left. Are you sure
you want to exit the Great Marsh?
DP.127.0010:
OK.\f
I’ll relieve you of your remaining
Safari Balls.\f
Thank you for playing.
We hope to see you again.\f
DP.127.0011:
Please enjoy the rest of your wild
Safari Game adventure!\f
DP.127.0012:
Welcome to the Great Marsh!
Is this your first Safari Game?
DP.127.0013:
When you enter the Great Marsh, you
start with 30 Safari Balls.\f
That’s the only kind of Ball you’re
allowed to use in the Safari Game.\f
The game is over when you run out of
Safari Balls, or when you’ve walked\r
500 steps.\f
Please do enjoy the untamed nature
of the Great Marsh!
DP.127.0014:
I see.
Enjoy your Safari Game!
